name: Vertical Agent Forge Control Plane
description: Runtime control plane, validators, metrics, and connector diagnostics for Vertical Agent Forge

enabled.label: Enable VAF Control Plane
enabled.help: Turns on the Vertical Agent Forge runtime control plane and gateway RPC methods.

tenantId.label: Tenant Id
tenantId.help: Logical tenant namespace used by the control-plane database.

workspaceDir.label: Workspace Dir
workspaceDir.help: Optional absolute path to the Vertical Agent Forge workspace. Leave empty to use the active agent workspace.

fullAuto.label: Full Auto
fullAuto.help: When enabled, the control plane enforces full-auto release semantics and rollback monitoring.

killSwitch.label: Kill Switch
killSwitch.help: Immediately blocks auto-promotion and marks the control plane degraded.

refreshIntervalMs.label: Refresh Interval (ms)
refreshIntervalMs.help: How often the control-plane service refreshes its runtime snapshot.
